title: NMR Serum Sample Preparation for NMR Metabolomics
author: Deanna Lanier

steps.title: In a 250 ml volumetric flask, dissolve 2321
steps.instruction: In a 250 ml volumetric flask, dissolve 2321.55 mg of anhydrous NaH 2 PO 4 and 802.25 mg of Na 2 HPO4 in 200 mL of D2O.

steps.title: Add 600 µL of NMR buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 600 µL of NMR buffer to each sample to resuspend the pellets

steps.title: Thaw the sample on ice or in 4 °C
steps.instruction: Thaw the sample on ice or in 4 °C

steps.title: Dry the samples in a speed-vac...
steps.instruction: Dry the samples in a speed-vac concentrator (time depends on the sample condition) Store the dry pellets in -80 °C if needed

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant of each sample to a new tube
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant of each sample to a new tube

steps.title: Centrifuge the samples at 16000 rcf for 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the samples at 16000 rcf for 00:30:00

steps.title: Vortex the samples and incubate the...
steps.instruction: Vortex the samples and incubate the samples in -20 °C for 00:20:00

steps.title: Add MeOH to samples on ice...
steps.instruction: Add MeOH to samples on ice at a 3:1 methanol-to-sample ratio 750 µL MeOH 250 µL neat sera for pre-challenge samples 1200 µL MeOH 400 µL near sera for post-challenge samples

steps.title: Thaw samples on ice or at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Thaw samples on ice or at 4 °C

steps.title: Add 833
steps.instruction: Add 833.25 µL of 0.1 DSS-D6 stock solution (1/3 of 1mM DSS when mixed with sample)

steps.title: Adjust the pH to pH 7
steps.instruction: Adjust the pH to pH 7.0 using HCL or NaOH

steps.title: Adjust the volume to 250 mL...
steps.instruction: Adjust the volume to 250 mL with D 2 O and mix well
